mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.order_id, r.product_id, r.reviewer_id, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.nickname END as reviewer_nickname, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar END as reviewer_avatar, r.seller_id, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.tags, r.is_anonymous, r.reply_id, r.reply_content, r.reply_time, r.create_time FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.order_id, r.product_id, r.reviewer_id, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.nickname END as reviewer_nickname, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar END as reviewer_avatar, r.seller_id, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.tags, r.is_anonymous, r.reply_id, r.reply_content, r.reply_time, r.create_time FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id WHERE r.seller_id = #{sellerId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.order_id, r.product_id, r.reviewer_id, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE u.nickname END as reviewer_nickname, CASE WHEN r.is_anonymous = 1 THEN NULL ELSE u.avatar END as reviewer_avatar, r.seller_id, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.tags, r.is_anonymous, r.reply_id, r.reply_content, r.reply_time, r.create_time FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.reviewer_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0
